summary: iter263.3 testing complete - Event Bus + Echo AI³ Drawer + Cross-Department Flow. Backend: 19/19 tests PASSED. All event types (beo.planned, beo.day_planned, vendor.contract_violation, purchrec.match_resolved, purchrec.auto_po_created, admin.rollout, admin.support_ticket, admin.flag_update) are correctly published via event_bus and broadcast over WebSocket. EnterpriseCommandCenter LiveActivityFeed correctly renders all new event types with proper icons and human-readable messages. Calendar sync pushes BEOs to calendar_events collection.

ui_bugs.issue: The Echo AI³ orb component (EchoAI3Enhanced.tsx) exists with correct data-testids but is NOT rendered in the app layout. The floating orb at bottom-right is not visible.
ui_bugs.note: Component file exists at /app/client/components/site/EchoAI3Enhanced.tsx with all required features (expand/collapse, live activity, WS connection) but needs to be imported and rendered in AppFull.tsx or the main layout

action_items: CRITICAL: Import and render EchoAI3Enhanced component in the main app layout (AppFull.tsx) to make the floating orb visible at bottom-right
The component at /app/client/components/site/EchoAI3Enhanced.tsx is complete with all required features but not mounted
critical_code_review_comments: EchoAI3Enhanced.tsx has correct implementation: data-testid='echo-ai-drawer', data-testid='echo-ai-drawer-expand', data-testid='echo-ai-live-activity', WS subscription, expand/collapse (520px ↔ 80vw), System Awareness section preserved
EnterpriseCommandCenter.tsx LiveActivityFeed correctly handles all new event types with proper icons and formatEvent() messages

success_rate.frontend: 90% - EnterpriseCommandCenter LiveActivityFeed works perfectly, but EchoAI3Enhanced orb not rendered

seed_data_creation: None - using existing BEO and seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend event_bus integration is fully working. All 8 new event types (beo.planned, beo.day_planned, vendor.contract_violation, purchrec.match_resolved, purchrec.auto_po_created, admin.rollout, admin.support_ticket, admin.flag_update) are published and broadcast via WebSocket. EnterpriseCommandCenter LiveActivityFeed shows events with correct icons and messages. The EchoAI3Enhanced component exists but needs to be mounted in the app layout.
mocked_apis_note: Vendor scorecard violations only emit when actual drift detected (seed data may not trigger). Tech support bridge returns delivered:false until AURION_SUPPORT_URL configured.

backend.beo_plan_day: PASS - Plans all BEOs on date, emits beo.day_planned with collisions/load_score
backend.beo_sync_to_calendar: PASS - Pushes BEOs to calendar_events, emits calendar.synced_from_beo
backend.calendar_events_banquet: PASS - Returns banquet type events after sync
backend.vendor_violations: PASS - Returns violations, emits vendor.contract_violation when violations > 0
backend.ws_connect_ping: PASS - WebSocket connects and responds to ping

frontend.live_activity_feed: PASS - Shows WS status 'LIVE', receives and displays all event types
frontend.live_activity_event_types: PASS - Correctly formats: admin.rollout, admin.support_ticket, admin.flag_update, purchrec.auto_po_created, purchrec.match_resolved, calendar.synced_from_beo
frontend.echo_ai3_orb: FAIL - Component exists but not rendered in app layout

POST /api/beo-planner/sync-to-calendar returns ok:true with pushed/skipped counts
GET /api/calendar/events returns event_type=banquet rows after sync
WebSocket /ws connects and receives typed events
EnterpriseCommandCenter LiveActivityFeed renders new event types with proper icons
